latent-space.notes: DreamerV4 packed tokenizer latents flattened from (8,64) to 512; shared PCA fitted on pooled true latents.

image-space-channel-mean.notes: Spatial mean RGB per frame, shape (T,3); lossy architecture-neutral sanity check.

image-space-PCA.notes: Flattened RGB frames projected through randomized PCA fitted on pooled true frames; 95% variance target capped at 50 PCs.
